sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Costco begins hiring as opening of Guilderland warehouse nears
feed.summary: Costco has started posting job listings for its new 163,000-square-foot warehouse in Guilderland, which is projected to open in August 2026 and employ over 150 people. The available positions range from cashiers and cake decorators to tire installers and pharmacy service clerks, with hourly wages typically between $20 and $33, and manager salaries up to nearly $200,000. Despite nearing completion, a Costco spokesperson stated it's company policy not to comment on new warehouses until two to three months before opening.

feed.title: There's A Lot To Like About Ameriprise Financial's (NYSE:AMP) Upcoming US$1.70 Dividend
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial (NYSE:AMP) will soon pay a US$1.70 dividend. The company's payout ratio is a low 16% of profits, suggesting the dividend is well-covered and sustainable. With earnings per share growing at 28% annually and dividends increasing by 9.1% over the last decade, Ameriprise Financial demonstrates strong financial health and a commitment to rewarding shareholders.

feed.title: ODFL Reports Improving Q1 Demand Despite Top-Line Decline
feed.summary: Old Dominion Freight Line (ODFL) reported improving demand for its services in Q1 2026, despite a year-over-year decline in revenue and earnings, which still exceeded Wall Street expectations. CEO Marty Freeman highlighted positive tonnage growth in February and March, attributing it to customer service and fair pricing, and emphasized the company's strategic investments for future growth and market share expansion. The LTL carrier reported net income of $238.3 million on revenue of $1.34 billion, with LTL revenue declining 2.9% due to lower volumes partially offset by higher revenue per hundredweight.

feed.title: Extra Space Storage Q1 2026 slides: core FFO rises 2% amid expense pressure
feed.summary: Extra Space Storage (NYSE:EXR) reported first-quarter 2026 results that surpassed analyst expectations, with Core Funds From Operations (FFO) per diluted share rising 2.0% to $2.04. Despite this growth, the company faced increasing expense pressure, particularly from insurance and property operating costs, which outpaced revenue growth in its same-store portfolio. Management maintained its full-year 2026 Core FFO guidance, signaling confidence in its strategy while acknowledging ongoing margin challenges.

feed.title: Delta partners with Fox to bring sports and streaming onboard
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines has announced a new partnership with Fox One to bring the streaming service onboard its flights, ensuring passengers can enjoy sports and other content. This collaboration aims to enhance the in-flight entertainment experience for Delta's customers. The article notes this move as part of Delta's ongoing efforts to improve services for business fliers and passengers.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G] REGENCY CENTERS CORP Passive Investment Disclosure (>5%)
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management has filed a Schedule 13G for Regency Centers Corp (REG), disclosing beneficial ownership of 15,010,830 shares, which represents 8.19% of the company's Common Stock. This filing indicates a passive investment stance from Vanguard. The document details voting and dispositive powers, with Vanguard having sole dispositive power over all shares and limited sole voting power, and emphasizes that no other single person holds more than 5% interest.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Prologis (PLD) After A 42% One Year Surge?
feed.summary: Prologis (PLD) has seen a significant 42% surge in the past year, trading at approximately US$141.53. However, Simply Wall St's analysis suggests the stock is currently overvalued. Both a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis and a Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio comparison indicate that PLD is trading above its intrinsic value and sector peers.

feed.title: Medtronic PLC Stock (MDT) Moved Down by 3.14% on Apr 29: What Signal Does It Send?
feed.summary: Medtronic PLC (MDT) experienced a 3.14% stock decline on April 29, reaching a 52-week low. This downturn is attributed to negative analyst revisions, including price target cuts from Jefferies and UBS, and investor uncertainty following a recent cybersecurity incident. Despite positive developments regarding new surgical systems and clinical milestones, these factors were overshadowed, leading to bearish sentiment.

feed.title: FirstEnergy is in talk with prospective customers representing over 6 gigawatts of load in West Virginia - conf call
feed.summary: FirstEnergy is actively engaging with potential customers in West Virginia, discussing over 6 gigawatts of load, according to a recent conference call. This news follows FirstEnergy's Q1 2026 earnings call, where the company reported rising quarterly profits driven by higher rates and data-center demand. The utility company is also maintaining its full-year core EPS guidance.

feed.title: Shareholders of CNA (NYSE: CNA) approve pay plan and add 5M award shares
feed.summary: CNA Financial Corporation shareholders overwhelmingly approved key proposals at their 2026 annual meeting, including the election of all nominated directors and an advisory vote on executive compensation with 94% support. They also approved an amendment to the company's incentive compensation plan, adding 5 million shares for awards, and ratified Deloitte & Touche LLP as independent registered public accountants for 2026, both with strong majorities. This indicates robust stockholder support for the company's governance, executive pay, equity incentive expansion, and audit firm.

This Schedule 13G filing indicates a passive investment approach, with Vanguard holding sole dispositive power over all shares and limited sole voting power over 39,062 shares. feed.title: Assessing Whether Gilead Sciences (GILD) Looks Undervalued After Recent Share Price Performance
feed.summary: Gilead Sciences (GILD) has seen strong long-term share price performance, despite recent short-term softening. The stock is currently trading at $129.26, which is significantly below its narrative fair value of $157.43, suggesting it is undervalued. This valuation is supported by the anticipated success of new product launches and an improved product mix, which are expected to drive higher gross margins and long-term earnings growth.

feed.title: A Look At Colgate-Palmolive (CL) Valuation As Hill’s Pet Nutrition Fuels Expected 2026 Earnings Growth
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive (CL) is drawing attention due to strong first-quarter 2026 revenue and EPS expectations, driven by consumer demand and advancements in Hill’s Pet Nutrition. Despite recent share price momentum, the stock is considered 11.4% undervalued with a fair value of $96.68, although its P/E ratio is higher than industry averages, suggesting less room for error. The company focuses on emerging markets, innovation, and productivity initiatives to sustain long-term growth.

feed.title: A Look At Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) Valuation After Strong Recent Share Price Returns
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) has seen significant share price returns recently, trading near its analyst price target at US$303.64. The company is currently considered about 1% overvalued by a narrative model, which focuses on earnings power and margin progression, while its P/E ratio presents a mixed picture. Investors are advised to review the underlying numbers and consider both the premium concerns and quality support before making investment decisions.

feed.title: Marathon Petroleum sets June 10 payout for $1 dividend
feed.summary: Marathon Petroleum (NYSE: MPC) has announced a quarterly dividend of $1.00 per share, payable on June 10, 2026. Shareholders of record by the close of business on May 20, 2026, will be eligible to receive this cash dividend. The company, headquartered in Findlay, Ohio, operates the largest refining system in the U.S.

feed.title: Verisk Analytics (NASDAQ:VRSK) Shares Up 8.3% on Better-Than-Expected Earnings
feed.summary: Verisk Analytics (NASDAQ:VRSK) saw its shares increase by 8.3% after reporting better-than-expected first-quarter earnings, with an EPS of $1.82 against an expected $1.74 and revenue of $782.6 million. The company also announced a raised quarterly dividend, a $2.5 billion share buyback program, and provided FY2026 guidance, though some analysts remain cautious about long-term growth and AI adoption concerns. Wall Street's consensus rating for VRSK is "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $237.20.

feed.title: Barron’s puts Beverly Hills advisor Lisa Detanna at No. 14 in California
feed.summary: Lisa Detanna, a Private Wealth Advisor at Raymond James & Associates, has been named No. 14 in California on Barron’s prestigious list of Top 1,500 Financial Advisors for 2026. This recognition highlights her 30-year commitment to providing personalized financial guidance to high-net-worth individuals and families, focusing on inheritance, estate planning, and financial education. The ranking considers factors such as assets under management, revenue, regulatory record, and philanthropic work.

feed.title: Chipotle’s US Union Dissolves Without Securing a Labor Contract
feed.summary: The Teamsters union has withdrawn its representation from a Chipotle restaurant in Lansing, Michigan, after failing to secure a labor contract for over three years. This decision means Chipotle is no longer obligated to recognize or negotiate with the union, highlighting the difficulties US unions face even after successful organization votes. The Lansing location was Chipotle's first and only unionized US restaurant.

feed.title: Vanguard discloses 5.3% stake in NRG Energy (NYSE: NRG)
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management has disclosed a 5.3% passive stake in NRG Energy, holding 11,371,848 shares of common stock. The Schedule 13G filing indicates Vanguard has sole dispositive power over all these shares but sole voting power over only 53,745 shares. This disclosure, signed by Ashley Grim on April 29, 2026, details the beneficial ownership and clarifies the distribution of voting versus dispositive authority within Vanguard's various entities.

feed.title: Waters Parkerson Bets $3 Million on a CBIZ Rebound
feed.summary: Waters Parkerson & Co. LLC increased its stake in CBIZ by 85,796 shares in Q1 2026, investing an estimated $3 million despite a 50% drop in CBIZ's share price over the past year. This contrarian move suggests confidence in CBIZ's ability to overcome integration challenges following its large acquisition of Marcum LLP in late 2024. The rebound hinges on CBIZ's execution and reduction in integration-related spending in the coming quarters.

feed.title: Chubb Unit Sues Catholic Group Over 1970s Sexual Abuse Claims
feed.summary: A unit of Chubb Ltd. has sued the Marianist Province of the US to limit insurance coverage for sexual abuse litigation dating back to the 1970s. Chubb's Federal Insurance Co. argues that its 1970s policies only covered accidental injuries, not intentional acts, and any coverage should be restricted to a single occurrence. This lawsuit was filed after four women claimed sexual abuse as minors at a Marianist retreat center.

feed.title: U.S. Bancorp (NYSE: USB) prices $8.177M callable notes due 2037
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp has priced $8.177 million in callable fixed-rate senior medium-term notes, Series EE, due April 30, 2037. These notes carry a fixed interest rate of 5.10% per annum and are callable at the issuer's option on specified quarterly redemption dates starting April 30, 2028. The notes are senior, unsecured obligations of U.S. Bancorp, are not FDIC-insured, and payments are subject to the company's credit risk.

feed.title: Trust-centered AI and the future of banking automation
feed.summary: Bancolombia S.A., Colombia's largest bank, prioritizes trust-centered AI by embedding process orchestration, human oversight, and audit trails into every AI deployment. This approach, discussed at Appian World 2026, emphasizes transparency and explainability in AI decisions within regulated financial environments. The bank successfully built a document automation system processing 80,000 documents monthly by first consolidating fragmented architecture, offering a cautionary tale to other financial institutions rushing AI adoption without proper governance.

feed.title: Globe Life (NYSE: GL) CEO exercises options, then sells 4,663 shares
feed.summary: Globe Life Inc.'s Co-Chairman & CEO, James Matthew Darden, exercised 4,663 Employee Stock Options at $100.74 per share on April 28, 2026, and simultaneously sold the same number of common shares at an average price of $153.88 per share. Following these transactions, Darden holds 58,451.4598 common shares directly, 4,185.5150 indirectly through a 401(k) plan, and retains 22,019 stock options. The net effect of these transactions was a sale of 4,663 shares, valued at approximately $717,530.

feed.title: CLS Maintained by Citigroup -- Price Target Raised to $415
feed.summary: Citigroup has maintained a 'Buy' rating for Celestica (CLS) and raised its price target to $415 from $338, indicating confidence in the company's future performance. Despite this positive analyst sentiment, GuruFocus data indicates that CLS is significantly overvalued at its current price of $367.95, with a GF Value of $114.59. Insider selling activity, totaling $97.7 million over three months, also suggests caution for potential investors.

feed.title: CLS Upgraded by TD Cowen -- Price Target Raised to $430
feed.summary: TD Cowen analyst John Shao upgraded Celestica (CLS) from "Hold" to "Buy," raising the price target to $430, a 22.86% increase. Despite this positive analyst outlook, GuruFocus indicates that CLS is significantly overvalued by 221.1% based on its GF Value, trading at $367.95 against an intrinsic value of $114.59. Insider selling totaling $97.7 million over the last three months also suggests caution for potential investors.

feed.title: Texas Instruments’ Breakout Was 5 Years in the Making. Does It Have Legs?
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (TXN) has seen a significant stock breakout, climbing over 44% in the past month and 51% year-to-date, driven by its five-year manufacturing investment finally yielding substantial earnings growth. The company reported strong Q1 2026 results with a 19% revenue increase, 23% EPS beat, and a 611% surge in free cash flow, alongside robust Q2 guidance. This performance is underpinned by a strategic manufacturing moat and domestic fab capacity that provides a competitive advantage.

feed.title: Chefs' Warehouse (NASDAQ:CHEF) Announces Quarterly Earnings Results, Beats Estimates By $0.17 EPS
feed.summary: Chefs' Warehouse (NASDAQ:CHEF) reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates with an EPS of $0.40 against an expected $0.23, and revenue of $1.06 billion, surpassing expectations of $1.01 billion. The company saw an 11.4% year-over-year revenue increase and expanded its gross margin, despite a negative impact on organic growth from the Middle East conflict. CHEF's liquidity remains healthy, with significant share repurchases and capacity for M&A.

feed.title: Broadway Financial Corporation (NASDAQ:BYFC) Short Interest Up 23.9% in April
feed.summary: Broadway Financial Corporation (NASDAQ:BYFC) saw a 23.9% increase in short interest in April, reaching 15,194 shares, which represents about 0.2% of the company's shares. Despite a "Sell" rating from Weiss Ratings and a consensus "Sell" from MarketBeat, institutional investor M3F Inc. boosted its stake by 19%. The company's stock recently traded up 0.3% at $7.88, with a market cap of $73.32 million.

feed.title: Coda Octopus Group Inc. (NASDAQ:CODA) Short Interest Up 30.2% in April
feed.summary: Coda Octopus Group Inc. (NASDAQ:CODA) experienced a significant 30.2% increase in short interest in April, reaching 201,678 shares. Despite insider selling by the CFO and a major shareholder, the company reported an EPS beat and higher-than-expected revenue. The stock traded at $10.87, with current insider ownership at approximately 21.8% and institutional ownership at 20.12%.

feed.title: Coastal Financial (NASDAQ:CCB) Announces Quarterly Earnings Results, Misses Expectations By $0.25 EPS
feed.summary: Coastal Financial (NASDAQ:CCB) announced its quarterly earnings, reporting $0.78 EPS, which missed analyst expectations of $1.03 by $0.25. The company's revenue of $56.3 million also fell short of the $138.43 million consensus. Following the announcement, the stock plunged 14.0% to $74.51, and institutional investors own approximately 59.24% of the shares.

feed.title: Short Interest in Chord Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:CHRD) Declines By 27.8%
feed.summary: Short interest in Chord Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:CHRD) decreased by 27.8% in April to 2,895,184 shares, representing about 5.1% of outstanding shares and a days-to-cover ratio of 2.9. The company's stock traded near a 12-month high of $144.35, with a market cap of $8.18 billion and a high P/E ratio of 229.47. Analysts have a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with a target price of $152.23.

feed.title: Carlsmed, Inc. (NASDAQ:CARL) Sees Large Drop in Short Interest
feed.summary: Carlsmed, Inc. (NASDAQ:CARL) experienced a significant 26.4% drop in short interest in April, with the total short interest falling to 571,356 shares. Institutional investors have increased their holdings in the company, with OrbiMed Advisors LLC, Janus Henderson Group PLC, and Vanguard Group Inc. initiating or adding to their positions. Despite a "Hold" consensus rating and a target price of $19.67, analyst sentiment is mixed, with some firms trimming price targets while others maintain "Buy" ratings.

feed.title: AbbVie Thanks 'Excellent Start To 2026' To Immunology And Neuroscience Strength
feed.summary: AbbVie (NYSE:ABBV) reported an excellent start to 2026, with first-quarter revenues beating consensus thanks to strong performance in its immunology and neuroscience portfolios. The company's adjusted earnings per share also surpassed expectations, leading to a raised profit outlook for fiscal year 2026. Key products like Skyrizi and Rinvoq saw significant sales growth, while Humira's sales declined.

feed.title: Coastal Financial Corporation (NASDAQ:CCB) Short Interest Down 24.0% in April
feed.summary: Coastal Financial Corporation (NASDAQ:CCB) experienced a significant 24.0% decrease in short interest in April, totaling 1,288,361 shares as of April 15th. This reduction follows the company's recent quarterly earnings report, which missed analyst expectations for both EPS ($0.78 vs. $1.03) and revenue ($56.3M vs. $138.4M). Despite the earnings shortfall, analysts maintain a "Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $133.60 for CCB shares.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Central Pacific Financial Q1 2026 earnings beat estimates
feed.summary: Central Pacific Financial Corp reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, with EPS of $0.78 surpassing analyst estimates, despite revenue of $72.93 million missing projections. The company highlighted robust net interest income and margin, continued focus on commercial real estate lending, and maintained a healthy capital position. Management provided a positive outlook for future net interest income growth and dividend payments, while addressing market competition and regulatory impacts during the earnings call.

feed.title: Crane raised to buy at Stifel following Q1 beat and raise
feed.summary: Stifel has upgraded Crane's rating to "buy" after the company reported stronger-than-expected first-quarter earnings and subsequently raised its financial outlook. This upgrade reflects confidence in Crane's improved performance and future prospects.
